title: 5 most recent open issues
prompt: List the 5 most recently created open issues in the cli/cli GitHub repository. For each, give only the number and title. Answer concisely.

title: One issue's title and author
prompt: In the cli/cli GitHub repository, what is the title of issue #13687 and who opened it (their login)? Answer in one line.

title: 5 most recent commits on default branch
prompt: Show the 5 most recent commits on the default branch of the cli/cli GitHub repository. For each, give the short SHA (7 chars) and the first line of the commit message.

title: Search open bug issues
prompt: Find 3 open issues labeled "bug" in the cli/cli GitHub repository and list their numbers and titles. Answer concisely.

title: Repo summary stats
prompt: For the cli/cli GitHub repository, report its description, primary language, star count, and default branch name. One short paragraph.
